methods.method_name: Add a monitoring address for rewards tracking, supporting Ethereum, Solana, Ink, and XLayer addresses.
Add one or more account members to a given account.
Add one or more institution members to a given institution.
Affirm settlement transaction for eligibility within a specified settlement window for the owning customer profile.
Calculate guaranteed fee for crypto withdrawal with specified amount or total to avoid withdrawal rejection.
Cancel a Settlement Transaction.
Cancel a stablecoin conversion by providing the conversion ID.
Cancel an order by submitting a cancellation request for a specific profile and order ID.
Create a deposit address on a blockchain network for depositing to a profile, with automatic setup for Stellar PYUSD.
Create a Fiat Withdrawal to withdraw fiat to the specified destination.
Create a new bilateral Settlement Transaction with one or more legs, ensuring balances are sufficient for settlement.
Create a new Person or Institution Identity on the Paxos Platform, with a status of 'PENDING' approval.
Create a new profile for this account with a type of 'NORMAL'.
Create a one-time orchestration to move assets between profiles on the Paxos platform.
Create a Paxos transfer to move assets between profiles of different entities.
Create a persistent orchestration rule to trigger orchestrations automatically based on matching deposits.
Create a request for a quote with Paxos as the issuer, excluding PAXG quotes during London gold market closure.
Create a Stablecoin Conversion request to exchange assets 1:1, handling errors like Insufficient Funds or Already Exists.
Create a test deposit to fund a profile in the sandbox environment.
Create an internal transfer to move assets between two profiles under the same customer.
Create different types of orders such as limit, market, stop market, and stop limit orders for buying or selling assets with specified conditions and maximum notional values.
Create Fiat Account - Set up a new account for initiating fiat withdrawals, specifying routing details as needed for wire transfers.
Create instructions for depositing fiat.
Create joint account with primary owner and additional members, including a financial advisor, for tax and ownership purposes.
Deactivate a profile by ID, preventing it from receiving deposits. Profiles with non-zero balances cannot be deactivated.
Delete a Fiat Account and prevent transfers to it.
Delete API Credentials by client ID.
Delete Orchestration Rule to deactivate and stop triggering new orchestrations while allowing existing ones to continue processing.
Execute Issuer Quote for a specific quote created by Paxos.
Execute on a quote to buy or sell an asset with specified details like side, market, and price.
Fetch a list of events created by the system. Filter by `created_at`, limit results, paginate using `page_cursor`, and control sort order with `order`.
Fetch a list of Identities with filtering options like `created_at`, `updated_at`, `summary_status`, and `identity_type`. Supports pagination.
Fetch a list of Settlement Transactions based on source or target profile ID, with options to filter by statuses and support for pagination.
Get specific orchestration by ID.
Initiate a test fiat deposit in the sandbox environment based on a previous `memo_id` from Fiat Deposit Instructions.
Initiate Crypto Withdrawal with Trustline Verification for PYUSD on Stellar Network.
List accounts with pagination, allowing retrieval of subsequent pages by passing the `page_cursor` value.
List all created API credentials.
List all documents associated with an identity, including pending ones.
List available markets for trading.
List available quotes for buying or selling assets, including the latest quotes for all supported assets.
List deposit addresses with optional filters and pagination.
List executions for a profile with optional filters, retrieving full details of underlying executions. Default 20 items per response.
List executions with optional filters based on account or profile ID, order ID, or date range.
List Fiat Accounts with optional filters and pagination, returning abbreviated account details. Use pagination for large result sets.
List issuer quote executions with full details where Paxos is the issuer, based on specified parameters.
List Orchestration Rules with filtering and pagination options based on profile ID, status, source asset, and destination asset.
List orchestrations with filtering and pagination capabilities, including operations like deposits, withdrawals, and conversions.
List payments based on provided filters.
List Profiles associated with the current Account, with options to filter by creation date, order, and pagination using page cursors.
List quote executions within a specific profile with optional filters like side, market, and status.
List Stablecoin Conversions with filtering and pagination. Retrieve conversions in reverse chronological order, with optional parameters.
List statements based on provided filters.
List tax forms for specified account IDs and tax year, with the most recent revision number. Links expire after 60 seconds.
List the most recent executions in the order book for a specific market.
List transfer limits for a specific transaction type.
List transfers with filtering and paging options, defaulting to reverse chronological order. Recommended polling workflow included.
Reject a crypto deposit awaiting travel rule info about the originator address. Only the deposit creator can reject it.
Remove an account member from an account.
Remove an institution member from an institution.
Request a URL to upload a document for identity verification or enhanced due diligence, specifying document type.
Retrieve a list of crypto destination addresses with optional filtering and pagination capabilities.
Retrieve a list of monitoring addresses filtered by network or a single record by network and address.
Retrieve a monitoring address by ID.
Retrieve a profile by ID or get the default profile using the "default" alias.
Retrieve a profile's available and trading balances by listing balances, with the option to specify assets.
Retrieve a quote execution for buying or selling an asset.
Retrieve a settlement transaction by its ID, requiring ownership of the source or target profile ID.
Retrieve a single stablecoin conversion using the transaction ID from the Create Stablecoin Conversion response.
Retrieve a specific transfer by ID to monitor status changes in the polling workflow.
Retrieve account details by ID.
Retrieve all versions of tax forms for a specific account and tax year, including the most recent revisions.
Retrieve current and 24-hour prior prices for specified markets, excluding any failed retrievals.
Retrieve detailed order information associated with a Profile ID, with optional filters like account ID, market, status, and order time range.
Retrieve details of a specific Fiat Account by ID, including account number, beneficiary name, and address.
Retrieve event details by event ID.
Retrieve Fiat Deposit Instructions for the current Account based on search criteria, with pagination support.
Retrieve full details of orders associated with a profile ID, with optional filters like market, status, and order time.
Retrieve historical average prices for a specific market at set time intervals without detailed execution data.
Retrieve identity details by ID, with options to include person or institution details and institution members.
Retrieve instructions for depositing fiat using a specific Paxos Fiat Deposit Instructions ID.
Retrieve order book statistics for a specific market including the last 24 hours and current data.
Retrieve order book statistics for all markets over the last 24 hours and from midnight UTC until current time, including external venue pricing when itBit exchange is unavailable.
Retrieve profile balance for a specific asset.
Retrieve the current status of an order for a specific profile. Historical data before May 16, 2022 is not available.
Retrieve the full list of bids and asks with resting quantities per price level in the order book for a specific market.
Set sandbox identity statuses including ID verification, sanctions verification, document verification, and additional screening.
Update a crypto deposit with required travel rule information for the originator address.
Update a monitored address name.
Update account details such as description, reference ID, metadata, and members' roles.
Update Fiat Account details, modify or add values in specified fields for the given account, and return it in `PENDING` status.
Update Identity with delta changes, including person/institution details, user disablement, tax details, and KYC refresh date.
Update or create a specified crypto destination address.
Update the nickname label for a specific profile.
